overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through the Rockford Hills district of Los Santos. The character crosses intersections and walks along sidewalks lined with palm trees, passing a mission-style church, modern skyscrapers, and upscale retail stores on a sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching intersection with historic church

events.description: character begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the intersection and stepping onto the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the road in the background

entered.detail: Spanish mission style church with two white towers and red tile roof
textured palm tree trunk in immediate foreground
tall contemporary glass building visible behind the church
wooden park bench with metal armrests on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny urban sidewalk with a prominent white mission-style church visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past palm trees and street furniture, approaching an intersection where the character begins to cross the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with Rockford Hills park signage

events.description: character crosses to opposite sidewalk revealing Rockford Hills sign
character turns right at the corner onto a new street

agents.ego_description: walking past the Rockford Hills sign and executing a right turn at the corner

entered.detail: large stone monument sign with 'Rockford Hills' text in landscaped park area
dark contemporary building with minimalist glass and steel facade
colorful food cart with yellow and red striped umbrella featuring a hot dog mascot

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character passes the Rockford Hills sign set in a small park area with palm trees. The camera turns right at the corner, revealing a modern black building and a colorful hot dog cart on the new sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food cart and approaching retail corner

events.description: character crosses another street intersection with traffic lights
approaching the corner with white retail building and Cluck-A-Hoop signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, crossing an intersection, and approaching a white retail building

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white stucco corner building with arched windows, green awnings, and red tile roof accents
colorful circular storefront sign for Cluck-A-Hoop restaurant

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the hot dog cart and crosses another intersection, passing a black sedan. The scene transitions to approach a distinctive white retail corner building with prominent Cluck-A-Hoop signage becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale retail shopping street with storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past continuous storefronts and display windows

notable_agents.action: woman walking ahead on the same sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large glass display windows with mannequins and merchandise visible inside
white rectangular planter boxes with green shrubs lining the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a continuous walk along an upscale retail street. The camera passes the Cluck-A-Hoop restaurant with its large display windows and planter boxes, following a pedestrian ahead while palm trees line the street center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban district that transitions from a quiet area near a church to a bustling upscale retail street. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving forward toward a white mission-style church before crossing a street intersection. As the camera proceeds, it passes a Rockford Hills sign in a small park and turns right to reveal a modern black building and a colorful hot dog cart. The scene then shifts across another intersection past a black sedan, gradually bringing a white retail corner building with Cluck-A-Hoop signage into view. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian along the retail strip, passing the restaurant's large display windows and planter boxes under a canopy of central palm trees.
